_**User (2025-08-06 21:28:18Z)**_

the front end grew uncontrolled and i got teh feeling we devloped quite some code smell.

please analyse the stats/team.html and all referenced components like tables and graphs. 
my goal would be
- reliable filtering 
-- clean data handling -> selector for different data bases, reliable callbacks
-- content is defined by currently active filters, e.g. if just a league is selected but not season, id like to see some super aggregated data scoped to all seasons, if also a season is selected i want to see the lieague standings, also highyl aggregated data for the seasons, if also a week gets selected, the week standings and aggreagated data for the week , if also a team is selected team specfic data, scoped either to the whole season or just the selected wseek, ... --> come up with a clean filtering concept and tailored dynamic content
-consistency of filters, always display reasonably populated button groups, update url 
- split up the big file into smaller more cohesive units, have a library of dynamic content blocks we can simply rearrange and display depending on the currently selected filters.

first critically challenge my ideas, suggest improvements. after we aligned come up with a plan on what and how to achieve and document it in a new md file. we ll implement later

        "contents": "\r\n            // Remove old event listener first to prevent duplicates\r\n            const newSelect = select.cloneNode(true);\r\n            select.parentNode.replaceChild(newSelect, select);\r\n\r\n            // Add event listener to new select\r\n            newSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n                const selectedTeam = this.value;\r\n                console.log('Selected team:', selectedTeam); // Debug log\r\n                if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                    updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n                    updateMessageVisibility();\r\n                    updateTeamHistory(selectedTeam);\r\n            \r\n                    updateLeagueComparison(selectedTeam); // Call new function\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Also trigger Phase 2 analysis if a season is already selected\r\n                    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                        // Team + specific season selected\r\n                        console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                        updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                        updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                        loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                        console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                        updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                        updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                        loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                        \r\n                        // Don't trigger change event automatically - let user make the choice\r\n                    }\r\n                ",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n            // Remove old event listener first to prevent duplicates\r\n            const newSelect = select.cloneNode(true);\r\n            select.parentNode.replaceChild(newSelect, select);\r\n\r\n            // Add event listener to new select\r\n            newSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n                const selectedTeam = this.value;\r\n                console.log('Selected team:', selectedTeam); // Debug log\r\n                if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                    updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n                    updateMessageVisibility();\r\n                    updateTeamHistory(selectedTeam);\r\n            \r\n                    updateLeagueComparison(selectedTeam); // Call new function\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Also trigger Phase 2 analysis if a season is already selected\r\n                    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                        // Team + specific season selected\r\n                        console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                        updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                        updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                        loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                        console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                        updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                        updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                        loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                        \r\n                        // Don't trigger change event automatically - let user make the choice\r\n                    }\r\n                ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        function loadSpecialMatches(teamName) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_special_matches?team_name=${encodeURIComponent(teamName)}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(data =\u003e displaySpecialMatches(data));\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(teamName, season) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_special_matches?team_name=${encodeURIComponent(teamName)}\u0026season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(data =\u003e displaySpecialMatches(data));\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateAllTeamsStats() {\r\n            // This would show overall league statistics\r\n            console.log('Showing all teams statistics');\r\n            // TODO: Implement all teams overview\r\n        }\r\n",

  fetch(&#96;/team/get_available_weeks?team_name=${teamName}\u0026season=${season}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                    const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\r\n                    // Handle case where weeks might be null, undefined, or not an array\r\n                    if (weeks \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(weeks) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                        container.innerHTML = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" value=\"${week}\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" message.style.display = 'none';\r\n            } else {\r\n                message.style.display = 'block';\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n                if (selectedSeason) {\r\n                    updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateSeasonButtons(teamName) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_available_seasons?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(seasons =\u003e {\r\n                    const container = document.getElementById('buttonsSeason');\r\n                    const buttonsSeason = ['All', ...seasons].map(season =\u003e &#96;\r\n                        \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"season\" id=\"season_${season}\" \r\n                               value=\"${season === 'All' ? '' : season}\" ${season === 'All' ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                        \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                    &#96;).join('');\r\n                    container.innerHTML = buttonsSeason;\r\n                    \r\n                    // Don't automatically select the first button - let user make the choice\r\n                    // The \"All\" button is already checked by default in the HTML generation\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // In updateTeamSelect, after calling updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam), also update weeks\r\n        function updateTeamSelect(teams) {\r\n            const select = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n            select.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                ${teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003coption value=\"${team}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            &#96;;\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "            // Add other handlers for week if needed\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "        function updateAvailableOptions() {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "            if (selectedTeam) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "                updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "                if (selectedSeason) {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "                    updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "                }\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "            }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "        function updateSeasonButtons(teamName) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "            fetch(&#96;/team/get_available_seasons?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r"

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n                if (selectedSeason) {\r\n                    updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateSeasonButtons(teamName) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_available_seasons?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(seasons =\u003e {\r\n                    const container = document.getElementById('buttonsSeason');\r\n                    const buttonsSeason = ['All', ...seasons].map(season =\u003e &#96;\r\n                        \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"season\" id=\"season_${season}\" \r\n                               value=\"${season === 'All' ? '' : season}\" ${season === 'All' ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                        \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                    &#96;).join('');\r\n                    container.innerHTML = buttonsSeason;\r\n                    \r\n                    // Don't automatically select the first button - let user make the choice\r\n                    // The \"All\" button is already checked by default in the HTML generation\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // In updateTeamSelect, after calling updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam), also update weeks\r\n        function updateTeamSelect(teams) {\r\n            const select = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n            select.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                ${teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003coption value=\"${team}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            &#96;;\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n        function updateTeamHistory(teamName) {\r\n            // Set current team name for use in other charts\r\n            window.currentTeamName = teamName;\r\n            \r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_team_history?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                    const seasons = Object.keys(data);\r\n                    const combinedPositions = seasons.map(season =\u003e {\r\n                        const leagueLevel = data[season].league_level;\r\n                        const position = data[season].final_position;\r\n                        return (leagueLevel - 1) * 10 + position;\r\n                    });\r\n                    \r\n                    const ctx = document.getElementById('chartTeamHistory').getContext('2d');\r\n                    if (window.teamHistoryChart instanceof Chart) {\r\n                        window.teamHistoryChart.destroy();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        function updateTeamHistory(teamName) {\r\n            // Set current team name for use in other charts\r\n            window.currentTeamName = teamName;\r\n            \r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_team_history?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                    const seasons = Object.keys(data);\r\n                    const combinedPositions = seasons.map(season =\u003e {\r\n                        const leagueLevel = data[season].league_level;\r\n                        const position = data[season].final_position;\r\n                        return (leagueLevel - 1) * 10 + position;\r\n                    });\r\n                    \r\n                    const ctx = document.getElementById('chartTeamHistory').getContext('2d');\r\n                    if (window.teamHistoryChart instanceof Chart) {\r\n                        window.teamHistoryChart.destroy();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n            // Populate highest scores\r\n            document.getElementById('highestScoresBody').innerHTML = data.highest_scores.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n\r\n            // Populate lowest scores\r\n            document.getElementById('lowestScoresBody').innerHTML = data.lowest_scores.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n\r\n            // Populate biggest wins\r\n            document.getElementById('biggestWinsBody').innerHTML = data.biggest_win_margin.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e+${match.WinMargin}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score} : ${match.Score -         ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n            // Populate highest scores\r\n            document.getElementById('highestScoresBody').innerHTML = data.highest_scores.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n\r\n            // Populate lowest scores\r\n            document.getElementById('lowestScoresBody').innerHTML = data.lowest_scores.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n\r\n            // Populate biggest wins\r\n            document.getElementById('biggestWinsBody').innerHTML = data.biggest_win_margin.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e+${match.WinMargin}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score} : ${match.Score - match.WinMargin}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n\r\n            // Populate biggest losses\r\n            document.getElementById('biggestLossesBody').innerHTML = data.biggest_loss_margin.map(match =\u003e &#96;\r\n                \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.WinMargin}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Score} : ${match.Score - match.WinMargin}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${formatEvent(match)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctd\u003e${match.Opponent}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %}",

{\r\n            // Initial load of teams\r\n            fetch('/team/get_teams')\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(teams =\u003e {\r\n updateAvailableOptions();\r\n            }\r\n            // Add other handlers for week if needed\r\n        });\r\n",

\r\n                                &#96;+${seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score}&#96; : \r\n                                seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score\r\n                        ];\r\n                    });\r\n\r\n                    const tableConfig = {\r\n                        data: tableData,\r\n                        columns: [\r\n                            { title: 'Saison' },\r\n                            { title: 'Liga' },\r\n                            { title: 'Platz' },\r\n                            { title: 'Team Ø' },\r\n                            { title: 'Liga Ø' },\r\n                            { title: 'Differenz' }\r\n                        ],\r\n                        headerGroups: []\r\n                    };\r\n\r\n                    document.getElementById('tableLeagueComparison').innerHTML = createTable(tableConfig);\r\n                })\r\n                .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                    console.error('Error loading league comparison data:', error);\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateClutchAnalysis(teamName, season) {\r\n            console.log('updateClutchAnalysis called with:', { teamName, season });\r\n            if (!teamName) {\r\n                console.log('Missing team parameter for clutch analysis');\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n",

\r\n                                &#96;+${seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score}&#96; : \r\n                                seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score\r\n                        ];\r\n                    });\r\n\r\n                    const tableConfig = {\r\n                        data: tableData,\r\n                        columns: [\r\n                            { title: 'Saison' },\r\n                            { title: 'Liga' },\r\n                            { title: 'Platz' },\r\n                            { title: 'Team Ø' },\r\n                            { title: 'Liga Ø' },\r\n                            { title: 'Differenz' }\r\n                        ],\r\n                        headerGroups: []\r\n                    };\r\n\r\n                    document.getElementById('tableLeagueComparison').innerHTML = createTable(tableConfig);\r\n                })\r\n                .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                    console.error('Error loading league comparison data:', error);\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateClutchAnalysis(teamName, season) {\r\n            console.log('updateClutchAnalysis called with:', { teamName, season });\r\n            if (!teamName) {\r\n                console.log('Missing team parameter for clutch analysis');\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        function updateLeagueComparison(teamName) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_league_comparison?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e {\r\n                    if (!response.ok) {\r\n                        throw new Error(&#96;HTTP error! status: ${response.status}&#96;);\r\n                    }\r\n                    return response.json();\r\n                })\r\n                .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                    if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {\r\n                        console.log('No league comparison data available');\r\n                        return;\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    const seasons = Object.keys(data).sort();\r\n                    const teamScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].team_performance.team_average_score);\r\n                    const leagueScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].league_averages.average_score);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Create area chart using the new generic function\r\n                    createAreaChart_vanilla(\r\n                        leagueScores,  // Reference data (league averages)\r\n                        teamScores,    // Actual data (team averages)\r\n                        'chartLeagueComparison',\r\n                        'Team vs League Performance by Season',\r\n                        seasons        // Labels (seasons)\r\n                    );\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "                });\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "        function updateLeagueComparison(teamName) {\r"

            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "                    const teamScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].team_performance.team_average_score);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "                    const leagueScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].league_averages.average_score);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "                    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "                    // Create area chart using the new generic function\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "                    createAreaChart_vanilla(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,
            "text": "                        leagueScores,  // Reference data (league averages)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "                        teamScores,    // Actual data (team averages)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "                        'chartLeagueComparison',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "                        'Team vs League Performance by Season',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "                        seasons        // Labels (seasons)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520,
            "text": "                    );\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522,
            "text": "                    // Create comparison table\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        function updateLeagueComparison(teamName) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_league_comparison?team_name=${teamName}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e {\r\n                    if (!response.ok) {\r\n                        throw new Error(&#96;HTTP error! status: ${response.status}&#96;);\r\n                    }\r\n                    return response.json();\r\n                })\r\n                .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                    if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {\r\n                        console.log('No league comparison data available');\r\n                        return;\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    const seasons = Object.keys(data).sort();\r\n                    const teamScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].team_performance.team_average_score);\r\n                    const leagueScores = seasons.map(season =\u003e data[season].league_averages.average_score);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Create area chart using the new generic function\r\n                    createAreaChart_vanilla(\r\n                        leagueScores,  // Reference data (league averages)\r\n                        teamScores,    // Actual data (team averages)\r\n                        'chartLeagueComparison',\r\n                        'Team vs League Performance by Season',\r\n                        seasons        // Labels (seasons)\r\n                    );\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 522
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 490
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/team/stats.html"
      },
      "score": 0.19091796875
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n                    const metricsHtml = &#96;\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003ch6\u003eBasic Statistics\u003c/h6\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eAverage Score:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e${data.mean_score}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eStandard Deviation:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e${data.std_deviation}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eCoefficient of Variation:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e${data.coefficient_of_variation}%\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eConsistency Rating:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"text-primary\"\u003e${data.consistency_rating}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                \u003c/table\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003ch6\u003eScore Range\u003c/h6\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eHighest Score:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"text-success\"\u003e${data.max_score}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eLowest Score:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"text-danger\"\u003e${data.min_score}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eScore Range:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e${data.score_range}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                    \u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eInterquartile Range:\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e${data.iqr}\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                \u003c/table\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    &#96;;\r\n                    document.getElementById('consistencyMetrics').innerHTML = metricsHtml;\r\n                })\r\n                .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                    console.error('Error loading consistency metrics data:', error);\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, request, jsonify\r\nfrom app.services.team_service import TeamService\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('team', __name__)\r\n\r\nteam_service=TeamService()\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/stats')\r\ndef stats():\r\n    return render_template('team/stats.html')",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_consistency_metrics')\r\ndef get_consistency_metrics():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            consistency_data = team_service.get_consistency_metrics(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(consistency_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_consistency_metrics: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "def get_margin_analysis():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "    try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        if not team_name:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        # Determine scope based on parameters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        if season and season != '':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "            if season not in team_history:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "        else:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "        return jsonify(margin_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "    except Exception as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_margin_analysis')\r\ndef get_margin_analysis():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_name = request.args.get('team_name')\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')  # Optional - if not provided, shows all seasons\r\n        \r\n        if not team_name:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing team_name parameter'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Determine scope based on parameters\r\n        if season and season != '':\r\n            # Team + specific season - get league name from team history\r\n            team_history = team_service.get_team_history(team_name)\r\n            if season not in team_history:\r\n                return jsonify({'error': f'Team {team_name} not found in season {season}'}), 400\r\n            \r\n            league_name = team_history[season]['league_name']\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, league_name, season)\r\n        else:\r\n            # Team only (all seasons) - pass None for season to get all seasons\r\n            margin_data = team_service.get_margin_analysis(team_name, None, None)\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify(margin_data)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_margin_analysis: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_averages')\r\ndef get_team_averages():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Averages - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        averages = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n        #print(averages)\r\n        return jsonify(averages)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_averages: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_averages')\r\ndef get_team_averages():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Averages - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        averages = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n        #print(averages)\r\n        return jsonify(averages)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_averages: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\nleague_service = LeagueService()\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/stats')\r\ndef stats():\r\n    try:\r\n        weeks = league_service.get_weeks()\r\n        print(f\"Available weeks: {weeks}\")  # Debug output\r\n        return render_template('league/stats.html', \r\n                            season=league_service.get_seasons(),\r\n                            league=league_service.get_leagues(),\r\n                            week=weeks)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in stats route: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "from app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import traceback\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "from app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "bp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "league_service = LeagueService()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "@bp.route('/league/stats')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "def stats():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        weeks = league_service.get_weeks()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        print(f\"Available weeks: {weeks}\")  # Debug output\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        return render_template('league/stats.html', \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "                            season=league_service.get_seasons(),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "                            league=league_service.get_leagues(),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                            week=weeks)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    except Exception as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        print(f\"Error in stats route: {str(e)}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "@bp.route('/league/get_combinations')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "def get_combinations():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    try:"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\nleague_service = LeagueService()\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/stats')\r\ndef stats():\r\n    try:\r\n        weeks = league_service.get_weeks()\r\n        print(f\"Available weeks: {weeks}\")  # Debug output\r\n        return render_template('league/stats.html', \r\n                            season=league_service.get_seasons(),\r\n                            league=league_service.get_leagues(),\r\n                            week=weeks)\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in stats route: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {}

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_points_vs_average')\r\ndef get_team_points_vs_average():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n           \r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Points vs Average - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        points_data = league_service.get_team_points_during_season(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n\r\n        averages_data = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n       \r\n        # Extract data from the new SeriesData structure\r\n        points_raw = points_data[\"data\"]\r\n        averages_raw = averages_data[\"data\"]\r\n\r\n        points_vs_average = dict()\r\n\r\n        for team, points in points_raw.items():\r\n            averages = averages_raw[team]\r\n            points_vs_average[team] = [[averages[i] , points[i]] for i in range(len(points))]\r\n       \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(points_vs_average)    \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        return jsonify(points_vs_average)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_points_vs_average: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_points_vs_average')\r\ndef get_team_points_vs_average():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n           \r\n\r\n        print(f\"Team Points vs Average - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}\")\r\n        if not all([season, league]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n            \r\n        points_data = league_service.get_team_points_during_season(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n\r\n        averages_data = league_service.get_team_averages_simple(\r\n            league_name=league,\r\n            season=season\r\n        )\r\n       \r\n        # Extract data from the new SeriesData structure\r\n        points_raw = points_data[\"data\"]\r\n        averages_raw = averages_data[\"data\"]\r\n\r\n        points_vs_average = dict()\r\n\r\n        for team, points in points_raw.items():\r\n            averages = averages_raw[team]\r\n            points_vs_average[team] = [[averages[i] , points[i]] for i in range(len(points))]\r\n       \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        #print(points_vs_average)    \r\n        #print(\"############################\")\r\n        return jsonify(points_vs_average)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_points_vs_average: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(traceback.format_exc())\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "class StatisticsService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_statistics(self, league: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[LeagueStatistics]:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        season_summary = PlayerSeasonSummary(\r\n            total_score=player_data[Columns.score].sum(),\r\n            total_points=player_data[Columns.points].sum(),\r\n            average_score=player_data[Columns.score].mean(),\r\n            games_played=len(player_data),\r\n            best_score=player_data[Columns.score].max(),\r\n            worst_score=player_data[Columns.score].min()\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate team contribution\r\n        team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': player_data[Columns.team_name].iloc[0], 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n        team_contribution = (season_summary.total_score / team_data[Columns.score].sum()) * 100\r\n        \r\n        return PlayerStatistics(\r\n            name=player,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            team_contribution=team_contribution\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def get_team_series_data(self, team_name: str, season: str, league: str, \r\n                            x_field: str, y_field: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team series data using the new SeriesData class\"\"\"\r\n        raw_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_team_series_data(team_name, season, league)\r\n        \r\n        series_data = calculate_series_data_from_dataframe(\r\n            df=pd.DataFrame(raw_data),\r\n            x_field=x_field,\r\n            y_field=y_field,\r\n            name=f\"{team_name} {y_field}\",\r\n            label_x=x_field,\r\n            label_y=y_field,\r\n            query_params={\"team\": team_name, \"season\": season, \"league\": league}\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        return series_data.to_dict()",

Calculate team contribution\r\n        team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': player_data[Columns.team_name].iloc[0], 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n        team_contribution = (season_summary.total_score / team_data[Columns.score].sum()) * 100\r\n        \r\n        return PlayerStatistics(\r\n            name=player,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            team_contribution=team_contribution\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def get_team_series_data(self, team_name: str, season: str, league: str, \r\n                            x_field: str, y_field: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team series data using the new SeriesData class\"\"\"\r\n        raw_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_team_series_data(team_name, season, league)\r\n        \r\n        series_data = calculate_series_data_from_dataframe(\r\n            df=pd.DataFrame(raw_data),\r\n            x_field=x_field,\r\n            y_field=y_field,\r\n            name=f\"{team_name} {y_field}\",\r\n            label_x=x_field,\r\n            label_y=y_field,\r\n            query_params={\"team\": team_name, \"season\": season, \"league\": league}\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        return series_data.to_dict()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self):\r\n        self.server = Server()\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

        "originalContents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self):\r\n        self.server = Server()\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    def get_league_history_table_data(self, league_name: str, season: str, week: Optional[int] = None) -\u003e TableData:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get league history as a TableData object for rendering.\n        \n        Args:\n            league_name: The league name\n            season: The season identifier\n            week: The week number (if None, gets the latest)\n            \n        Returns:\n            TableData object with the league history\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.get_league_table_simple(season=season, league=league_name, week=week, include_history=True)\n\n    def get_team_averages_simple(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get team averages throughout a season - simple direct query approach\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Direct query to get team data for the league and season\n            filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'},\n\n            }\n            \n            # Get all team data for this league and season\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=filters)\n            \n            if team_data.empty:\n                return SeriesData(\n                    label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \n                    label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \n                    name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \n                    query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name, \"computed_data\": False}\n                ).to_dict()\n            \n            # Group by team and week to calculate averages\n            series_data = SeriesData(\n                label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \n                label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \n                name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \n                query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name}\n            )\n            \n            # Get all teams and weeks\n            teams = team_data[Columns.team_name].unique()",

        "originalContents": "\n\n    def get_league_history_table_data(self, league_name: str, season: str, week: Optional[int] = None) -\u003e TableData:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get league history as a TableData object for rendering.\n        \n        Args:\n            league_name: The league name\n            season: The season identifier\n            week: The week number (if None, gets the latest)\n            \n        Returns:\n            TableData object with the league history\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.get_league_table_simple(season=season, league=league_name, week=week, include_history=True)\n\n    def get_team_averages_simple(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get team averages throughout a season - simple direct query approach\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Direct query to get team data for the league and season\n            filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'},\n\n            }\n            \n            # Get all team data for this league and season\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=filters)\n            \n            if team_data.empty:\n                return SeriesData(\n                    label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \n                    label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \n                    name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \n                    query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name, \"computed_data\": False}\n                ).to_dict()\n            \n            # Group by team and week to calculate averages\n            series_data = SeriesData(\n                label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \n                label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \n                name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \n                query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name}\n            )\n            \n            # Get all teams and weeks\n            teams = team_data[Columns.team_name].unique()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self):\r\n        self.server = Server()\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService()\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}Home{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!--h1\u003eBowling Dashboard\u003c/h1--\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Info\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- We'll add stats here later --\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDiese Seite ist ein Proof of Concept zur Darstellung von Ergebnissen und Statistiken rund um Bowling Ligen, Tuniere und Pokalwettbewerbe.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDie Auswertungen sind oben über die Navigation zu \"League Stats\" und \"Player Stats\" zu finden.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eHauptaugenmerk liegt derzeit auf den Ligastatistiken. Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eMomentan ist die Seite noch nicht wirklich an Mobilgeräte angepasst, am besten also per PC oder Tablet versuchen.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n                \u003cp\u003e\r\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eMomentan scheint für alle Ligen 1 Spieltag zu wenig simuliert zu werden, nicht wundern :-) \u003c/strong\u003e\r\n                \u003c/p\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Letzte Events\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cul class=\"list-group\" id=\"latestEvents\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Will be populated via JavaScript --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Add JavaScript for latest events --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch4\u003ePlayer Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n                type=\"text\" \r\n                class=\"form-control\" \r\n                id=\"playerInput\" \r\n                list=\"playerList\" \r\n                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r\n                autocomplete=\"off\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r\n            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Basic player info will be here --\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Lifetime Stats Card --\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "{% block content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        \u003ch4\u003ePlayer Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            \u003cinput \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "                type=\"text\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                class=\"form-control\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "                id=\"playerInput\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                list=\"playerList\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                autocomplete=\"off\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            \u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r"

          },

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!-- Existing player selection card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch4\u003ePlayer Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel for=\"playerInput\" class=\"form-label\"\u003eSelect Player\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n                type=\"text\" \r\n                class=\"form-control\" \r\n                id=\"playerInput\" \r\n                list=\"playerList\" \r\n                placeholder=\"Type a player name...\"\r\n                autocomplete=\"off\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            \u003cdatalist id=\"playerList\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- Players will be loaded here --\u003e\r\n            \u003c/datalist\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"playerStats\" class=\"mt-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Basic player info will be here --\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Lifetime Stats Card --\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/player/content.html"
      },
      "score": 0.2041015625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch5 class=\"mb-0\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-link text-decoration-none p-0\" type=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"collapse\" data-bs-target=\"#playerRoutesCollapse\" aria-expanded=\"true\" aria-controls=\"playerRoutesCollapse\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ci class=\"bi bi-chevron-down me-1\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Player Routes\r\n                \u003c/button\u003e\r\n            \u003c/h5\u003e\r\n            \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"testAllPlayerRoutes()\"\u003eTest All Player Routes\u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"collapse show\" id=\"playerRoutesCollapse\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                {% include \"test/player_tests.html\" %}\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Team Analysis Modules Card --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch5 class=\"mb-0\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-link text-decoration-none p-0\" type=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"collapse\" data-bs-target=\"#teamAnalysisCollapse\" aria-expanded=\"true\" aria-controls=\"teamAnalysisCollapse\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ci class=\"bi bi-chevron-down me-1\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Team Analysis Modules\r\n                \u003c/button\u003e\r\n            \u003c/h5\u003e\r\n            \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"testAllTeamAnalysis()\"\u003eTest All Team Analysis\u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ClutchAnalysisModule = {\r\n    name: 'clutchAnalysis',\r\n    \r\n    // Load the module\r\n    load: function(containerId, params) {\r\n        console.log('Loading Clutch Analysis Module with params:', params);\r\n        \r\n        // Create container if it doesn't exist\r\n        let container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n        if (!container) {\r\n            container = document.createElement('div');\r\n            container.id = containerId;\r\n            document.getElementById('analysisModules').appendChild(container);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Load the module HTML\r\n        this.loadHTML(container);\r\n        \r\n        // Run analysis if params are provided\r\n        if (params \u0026\u0026 params.teamName) {\r\n            this.run(params);\r\n        }\r\n    },\r\n    \r\n    // Load HTML content\r\n    loadHTML: function(container) {\r\n        // This would load the HTML template\r\n        // For now, we'll create it inline\r\n        container.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 class=\"mb-0\"\u003eClutch Performance Analysis\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"ClutchAnalysisModule.test()\"\u003eTest Analysis\u003c/button\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-3 d-flex align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary me-2\" onclick=\"ClutchAnalysisModule.run()\"\u003eRun Analysis\u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cspan id=\"clutchAnalysisTime\" class=\"text-muted\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"clutchAnalysisResult\" class=\"result-container\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Results will be shown here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    },\r\n    \r\n    // Run the analysis\r\n",

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "// Clutch Analysis Module\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "const ClutchAnalysisModule = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    name: 'clutchAnalysis',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    // Load the module\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "    load: function(containerId, params) {\r"

          {
