            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        // Create container if it doesn't exist\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        let container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        if (!container) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            container = document.createElement('div');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            container.id = containerId;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "            document.getElementById('analysisModules').appendChild(container);\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        // Load the module HTML\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        this.loadHTML(container);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        // Run analysis if params are provided\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        if (params \u0026\u0026 params.teamName) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            this.run(params);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        // For now, we'll create it inline\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "        container.innerHTML = &#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r"

          {

        "originalContents": "const ClutchAnalysisModule = {\r\n    name: 'clutchAnalysis',\r\n    \r\n    // Load the module\r\n    load: function(containerId, params) {\r\n        console.log('Loading Clutch Analysis Module with params:', params);\r\n        \r\n        // Create container if it doesn't exist\r\n        let container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n        if (!container) {\r\n            container = document.createElement('div');\r\n            container.id = containerId;\r\n            document.getElementById('analysisModules').appendChild(container);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Load the module HTML\r\n        this.loadHTML(container);\r\n        \r\n        // Run analysis if params are provided\r\n        if (params \u0026\u0026 params.teamName) {\r\n            this.run(params);\r\n        }\r\n    },\r\n    \r\n    // Load HTML content\r\n    loadHTML: mb-4\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 class=\"mb-0\"\u003eClutch Performance \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-3 d-flex align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary me-2\" onclick=\"ClutchAnalysisModule.run()\"\u003eRun Analysis\u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cspan id=\"clutchAnalysisTime\" class=\"text-muted\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"clutchAnalysisResult\" class=\"result-container\"\u003e\r\n         "originalContents": "\u003cnav class=\"navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ca class=\"navbar-brand\" href=\"{{ url_for('main.index') }}\"\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/a\u003e\r\n        \u003cbutton class=\"navbar-toggler\" type=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"collapse\" data-bs-target=\"#navbarNav\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan class=\"navbar-toggler-icon\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"collapse navbar-collapse\" id=\"navbarNav\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cul class=\"navbar-nav\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cli class=\"nav-item\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ca class=\"nav-link\" href=\"{{ url_for('player.stats') }}\"\u003ePlayer Stats\u003c/a\u003e\r\n                \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                \u003cli class=\"nav-item\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ca class=\"nav-link\" href=\"{{ url_for('league.stats') }}\"\u003eLeague Stats\u003c/a\u003e\r\n                \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                \u003cli class=\"nav-item\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ca class=\"nav-link\" href=\"{{ url_for('team.stats') }}\"\u003eTeam Stats\u003c/a\u003e\r\n                \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                \u003cli class=\"nav-item\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ca class=\"nav-link\" href=\"{{ url_for('main.test') }}\"\u003eAPI Test\u003c/a\u003e\r\n                \u003c/li\u003e\r\n            \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n",

data-i18n=\"team\"\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 901,
            "text": "                    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 902,
            "text": "                &#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 903,
            "text": "            });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 904,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 905,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 906,
            "text": "    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 907,
            "text": "        switch (buttonType) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 908,
            "text": "            case 'season':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 909,
            "text": "                updateLeagueButtons();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 910,
            "text": "                updateWeekButtons();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 911,
            "text": "                updateTeamButtons();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 912,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 913,
            "text": "            case 'league':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 914,
            "text": "                updateWeekButtons();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 915,
            "text": "                updateTeamButtons();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 916,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 917,
            "text": "            case 'week':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 918,
            "text": "                // No dependent buttons for week\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 919,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 920,
            "text": "            case 'team':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 921,
            "text": "                // No dependent buttons for team\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 922,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 923,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 924,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 925,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 926,
            "text": "    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 927,
            "text": "    function updateAllContent() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 928,
            "text": "        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 929,
            "text": "        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 930,
            "text": "        updateChartsLeague();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 931,
            "text": "        updateHonorScores();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 932,
            "text": "        updateTableTeamDetails();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 933,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 934,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 935,
            "text": "    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 936,
            "text": "        switch (buttonType) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 937,
            "text": "            case 'season':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 938,
            "text": "            case 'league':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 939,
            "text": "                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 940,
            "text": "                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 941,
            "text": "                updateChartsLeague();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 942,
            "text": "                updateHonorScores();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 943,
            "text": "                updateTableTeamDetails();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 944,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945,
            "text": "            case 'week':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946,
            "text": "                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947,
            "text": "                updateHonorScores();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 948,
            "text": "                updateTableTeamDetails();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 949,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 950,
            "text": "            case 'team':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 951,
            "text": "                updateTableTeamDetails();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 952,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953,
            "text": "            case 'teamView':\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 954,
            "text": "                updateTableTeamDetails();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955,
            "text": "                break;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 956,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 958,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 959,
            "text": "    // --- Smart Default Initialization ---\r"
          }

        "originalContents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        .btn-secondary {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-accent);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-accent);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .btn-secondary:hover {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* Alert Styles */\r\n        .alert-danger {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .alert-info {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-info);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-info);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .alert-warning {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/style\u003e\r\n\u003c/head\u003e\r\n\u003cbody\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Include navbar component --\u003e\r\n    {% include 'components/navbar.html' %}\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- Main content --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e\r\n        {% block content %}{% endblock %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        .btn-secondary {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-accent);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-accent);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .btn-secondary:hover {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /* Alert Styles */\r\n        .alert-danger {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .alert-info {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-info);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-info);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .alert-warning {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            border-color: var(--theme-warning);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/style\u003e\r\n\u003c/head\u003e\r\n\u003cbody\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Include navbar component --\u003e\r\n    {% include 'components/navbar.html' %}\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- Main content --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"container\"\u003e\r\n        {% block content %}{% endblock %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\r\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            color: white !important;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- TODO: Fix jumpy season button behavior - buttons don't stick to selection properly --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\r\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "{% block content %}\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\r"

            "text": "\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\r"

          {

            "text": "        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\r"

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\r\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            color: white !important;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- TODO: Fix jumpy season button behavior - buttons don't stick to selection properly --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\r\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

           \u003ch5 class=\"card-title\"\u003eSeason Records\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                        \u003ctable class=\"table table-sm\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003ctbody\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003eBest Season:\u003c/th\u003e\u003ctd id=\"bestSeason\"\u003e-\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                                \u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003eMost Improved:\u003c/th\u003e\u003ctd id=\"mostImproved\"\u003e-\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n table-striped\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cthead\u003e\r\n                    \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eSeason\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eGames\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eTotal Pins\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eAverage\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eDev. from Avg\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003evs Last Season\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eBest Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                        \u003cth\u003eWorst Game\u003c/th\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n                \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n                \u003ctbody id=\"seasonStatsBody\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Season stats will be populated here --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n            \u003c/table\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Existing trend chart card --\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"card mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const playerInput = document.getElementById('playerInput');\r\n    const playerList = document.getElementById('playerList');\r\n    \r\n    // Load all players immediately\r\n    fetch('{{ url_for(\"player.search_players\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(players =\u003e {\r\n            // Populate datalist with options\r\n            playerList.innerHTML = players.map(player =\u003e \r\n                &#96;\u003coption value=\"${player.name}\" data-id=\"${player.id}\"\u003e&#96;\r\n            ).join('');\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Handle player selection\r\n    playerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedName = this.value;\r\n        const option = Array.from(playerList.options).find(opt =\u003e opt.value === selectedName);\r\n        \r\n        if (option) {\r\n            const playerName = option.dataset.id;\r\n            loadPlayerStats(playerName);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function loadPlayerStats(playerName) {\r\n        console.log(\"loadPlayerStats: \" + playerName);\r\n        fetch(&#96;{{ url_for(\"player.get_lifetime_stats\") }}?player_name=${playerName}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n\r\n\r\n            .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                displayLifetimeStats(data.lifetime);\r\n                displaySeasonStats(data.seasons);\r\n                updateTrendChart(data);  // We'll keep the existing chart functionality\r\n            });\r\n    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    const playerInput = document.getElementById('playerInput');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    const playerList = document.getElementById('playerList');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    // Load all players immediately\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    fetch('{{ url_for(\"player.search_players\") }}')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        .then(players =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "            // Populate datalist with options\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "            playerList.innerHTML = players.map(player =\u003e \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "                &#96;\u003coption value=\"${player.name}\" data-id=\"${player.id}\"\u003e&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "            ).join('');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    // Handle player selection\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    playerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "        const selectedName = this.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        const option = Array.from(playerList.options).find(opt =\u003e opt.value === selectedName);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        if (option) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "            const playerName = option.dataset.id;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "            loadPlayerStats(playerName);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    function loadPlayerStats(playerName) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        console.log(\"loadPlayerStats: \" + playerName);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        fetch(&#96;{{ url_for(\"player.get_lifetime_stats\") }}?player_name=${playerName}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "            .then(data =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "                displayLifetimeStats(data.lifetime);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "                displaySeasonStats(data.seasons);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "            });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    }\r"

        "originalContents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const playerInput = document.getElementById('playerInput');\r\n    const playerList = document.getElementById('playerList');\r\n    \r\n    // Load all players immediately\r\n    fetch('{{ url_for(\"player.search_players\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(players =\u003e {\r\n            // Populate datalist with options\r\n            playerList.innerHTML = players.map(player =\u003e \r\n                &#96;\u003coption value=\"${player.name}\" data-id=\"${player.id}\"\u003e&#96;\r\n            ).join('');\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Handle player selection\r\n    playerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedName = this.value;\r\n        const option = Array.from(playerList.options).find(opt =\u003e opt.value === selectedName);\r\n        \r\n        if (option) {\r\n            const playerName = option.dataset.id;\r\n            loadPlayerStats(playerName);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function loadPlayerStats(playerName) {\r\n        console.log(\"loadPlayerStats: \" + playerName);\r\n        fetch(&#96;{{ url_for(\"player.get_lifetime_stats\") }}?player_name=${playerName}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n\r\n\r\n            .then(data =\u003e {\r\n                displayLifetimeStats(data.lifetime);\r\n                displaySeasonStats(data.seasons);\r\n                updateTrendChart(data);  // We'll keep the existing chart functionality\r\n            });\r\n    }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

            "line": 163
          },

            "line": 121
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/player/content.html"

      "score": 0.1337890625
    }
  ]
}

_**Agent**_

## Critical Analysis of Current Frontend Issues

After analyzing the `team/stats.html` and related components, I've identified several major code smells and architectural problems:

### **Current Code Smells Identified:**

1. **📏 Massive Monolithic Template (799 lines)** 
   - Single file contains HTML, CSS, and 500+ lines of JavaScript
   - Multiple responsibilities mixed together (filtering, charting, data fetching)
   - Extremely difficult to maintain and debug

2. **🔗 Inconsistent State Management**
   - Filter state scattered across DOM queries (`document.querySelector('input[name="season"]:checked')`)
   - No centralized state management
   - URL not updated to reflect current filters
   - TODO comment indicates known issues: "Fix jumpy season button behavior"

3. **🔄 Repetitive Data Fetching Logic**
   - Similar `fetch()` patterns repeated 10+ times
   - Error handling duplicated across functions
   - No caching or request deduplication

4. **🎯 Tight Coupling & Dependencies**
   - Components directly manipulate DOM elements by ID
   - Hard-coded dependencies between filtering and content updates
   - Global variables scattered (`window.currentTeamName`, `window.teamHistoryChart`)

5. **📊 Mixed Chart Management**
   - Chart instances stored in global window object
   - Inconsistent cleanup (some charts destroyed, others not)
   - Chart.js and ECharts mixed without clear pattern

6. **🌐 No Hierarchical Filtering Logic**
   - Current logic: Team → Season → Week (linear)
   - Missing: Database → League → Season → Week → Team (hierarchical)
   - No proper aggregation levels

### **Challenges with Your Proposed Concept:**

1. **✅ Your filtering idea is excellent** - hierarchical filtering with proper aggregation levels
2. **⚠️ Content scope definition needs refinement** - we should define clear content "modes" based on filter depth
3. **✅ Component splitting is necessary** - but we need a clear component architecture
4. **✅ URL consistency is crucial** - but needs proper state management

### **Improved Architecture Proposal:**

#### **1. Hierarchical Filter System:**
```
No Selection → Overview dashboard
Database Only → Multi-database comparison
Database + League → League overview with multi-season comparison  
Database + League + Season → Season standings and stats
Database + League + Season + Week → Week-specific standings
Database + League + Season + Week + Team → Team deep-dive
Database + League + Season + Team → Team season analysis
```

#### **2. Content Block Library:**
- **Overview Blocks**: Multi-league/season summaries
- **League Blocks**: Standings tables, league averages
- **Season Blocks**: Season progression charts, final standings
- **Week Blocks**: Current week standings, week-specific stats  
- **Team Blocks**: Team history, performance analysis, clutch stats
- **Comparison Blocks**: Team vs league, head-to-head

#### **3. State Management System:**
- URL-driven state: `/team/stats?db=main&league=A&season=2024&week=5&team=TeamX`
- Centralized filter state object
- Reactive content updates based on state changes
- Browser history support

#### **4. Component Architecture:**
```
├── FilterManager (handles all filter logic)
├── ContentRenderer (renders appropriate blocks)
├── DataManager (handles API calls & caching)
├── URLManager (sync state with URL)
└── ContentBlocks/
    ├── OverviewBlock
    ├── LeagueStandingsBlock  
    ├── TeamHistoryBlock
    ├── ClutchAnalysisBlock
    └── ComparisonBlock
```

**Do you agree with this analysis and proposed direction?** I think your core ideas are sound, but we need this structured approach to avoid recreating the same maintenance issues. 

Once we align on this architecture, I'll create a detailed implementation plan in a markdown document.

_**Agent**_

_**Agent**_

Excellent point! You're absolutely right - we need to design for **flexible filter hierarchies** rather than assuming a fixed order. Different views will have different "primary" filters and logical hierarchies.

## **Flexible Filter Hierarchy Design**

### **Context-Dependent Filter Orders:**

**League-Centric Views** (`/league/stats`):
```
Database → League → Season → Week → Team
```

**Team-Centric Views** (`/team/stats`):
```
Database → Team → Season → Week → League
```

**Player-Centric Views** (`/player/stats`):
```
Database → Player → Season → Team → Week
```

**Tournament Views** (future):
```
Database → Tournament → Round → Match → Team
```

### **Proposed Filter Architecture:**

#### **1. Filter Schema Definition**
Each view defines its own filter hierarchy and available aggregation levels:

```javascript
const FILTER_SCHEMAS = {
  'league-stats': {
    hierarchy: ['database', 'league', 'season', 'week', 'team'],
    contentModes: {
      0: 'multi-database-overview',
      1: 'database-overview', 
      2: 'league-overview',
      3: 'season-standings',
      4: 'week-standings', 
      5: 'team-deep-dive'
    },
    defaultAggregations: {
      2: 'multi-season-comparison',
      3: 'season-progression',
      4: 'week-specific-stats'
    }
  },
  
  'team-stats': {
    hierarchy: ['database', 'team', 'season', 'week', 'league'],
    contentModes: {
      0: 'multi-database-overview',
      1: 'database-teams-overview',
      2: 'team-all-seasons',
      3: 'team-season-analysis', 
      4: 'team-week-performance',
      5: 'team-vs-opponent'
    },
    defaultAggregations: {
      2: 'multi-season-history',
      3: 'season-detailed-stats',
      4: 'week-vs-season-comparison'
    }
  }
}
```

#### **2. Dynamic Filter Manager**
```javascript
class FilterManager {
  constructor(schemaKey) {
    this.schema = FILTER_SCHEMAS[schemaKey];
    this.state = {};
    this.activeDepth = 0;
  }
  
  setFilter(filterType, value) {
    // Update state and recalculate active depth
    // Trigger content updates based on new depth
  }
  
  getAvailableFilters() {
    // Return next available filter options based on current state
  }
  
  getContentMode() {
    // Return appropriate content mode for current filter depth
  }
}
```

#### **3. Content Block Registry**
```javascript
const CONTENT_BLOCKS = {
  // Shared blocks usable across different views
  'team-history-chart': TeamHistoryBlock,
  'league-standings-table': LeagueStandingsBlock,
  'season-progression-chart': SeasonProgressionBlock,
  
  // View-specific block compositions
  'team-all-seasons': [
    'team-history-chart', 
    'team-performance-summary',
    'team-league-comparison'
  ],
  
  'league-overview': [
    'league-standings-table',
    'league-averages-chart', 
    'top-performers'
  ]
}
```

#### **4. Flexible Content Rendering**
The system determines which content blocks to show based on:
- **Current filter depth** (how many filters are active)
- **Available data scope** (what aggregations make sense)
- **View context** (league-centric vs team-centric)

### **Benefits of This Approach:**

✅ **Future-Proof**: Easy to add new filter orders for different views
✅ **Consistent**: Same underlying architecture across all views  
✅ **Flexible**: Content adapts to any filter combination
✅ **Maintainable**: Clear separation between filter logic and content rendering
✅ **Extensible**: New content blocks can be added to any view

### **URL Structure Examples:**
```
/league/stats?db=main&league=A&season=2024&week=5
/team/stats?db=main&team=TeamX&season=2024&week=5  
/player/stats?db=main&player=PlayerY&season=2024&team=TeamX
```

The filter order in the URL doesn't matter - the view's schema determines the logical hierarchy and content rendering.

**Does this flexible approach address your concern about diverging filter orders?** This way we can implement league-centric filtering now and easily add team-centric filtering later without architectural changes.

_**Agent**_

_**Agent**_

Perfect! Let me design the **Content Block Library** based on the current functionality I observed in the codebase.

## **Content Block Library Design**

### **1. Core Content Block Categories**

#### **📊 Data Visualization Blocks**
```javascript
// Chart-based content blocks
CHART_BLOCKS = {
  'team-history-chart': {
    component: 'TeamHistoryChart',
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_team_history',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    chartType: 'line',
    description: 'Team position history across seasons'
  },
  
  'league-comparison-chart': {
    component: 'LeagueComparisonChart', 
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_league_comparison',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    chartType: 'area',
    description: 'Team performance vs league average'
  },
  
  'clutch-performance-chart': {
    component: 'ClutchPerformanceChart',
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_clutch_analysis', 
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    optionalFilters: ['season'],
    chartType: 'horizontal-bar',
    description: 'Clutch game wins/losses by opponent'
  },

  'season-progression-chart': {
    component: 'SeasonProgressionChart',
    dataEndpoint: '/league/get_team_positions',
    requiredFilters: ['league', 'season'],
    chartType: 'line-multi',
    description: 'All teams position changes throughout season'
  }
}
```

#### **📋 Table-based Blocks**
```javascript
TABLE_BLOCKS = {
  'league-standings-table': {
    component: 'LeagueStandingsTable',
    dataEndpoint: '/league/get_team_positions', 
    requiredFilters: ['league', 'season'],
    optionalFilters: ['week'],
    tableType: 'standings',
    description: 'Current league standings'
  },
  
  'special-matches-table': {
    component: 'SpecialMatchesTable',
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_special_matches',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    optionalFilters: ['season'],
    tableType: 'highlights',
    description: 'Highest/lowest scores, biggest wins/losses'
  },
  
  'head-to-head-table': {
    component: 'HeadToHeadTable', 
    dataEndpoint: '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table',
    requiredFilters: ['league', 'season', 'week'],
    tableType: 'matchups',
    description: 'Week-specific team matchups and results'
  }
}
```

#### **📈 Statistics Blocks** 
```javascript
STATS_BLOCKS = {
  'consistency-metrics': {
    component: 'ConsistencyMetrics',
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_consistency_metrics',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    optionalFilters: ['season'],
    displayType: 'metrics-grid',
    description: 'Team consistency statistics and ratings'
  },
  
  'clutch-stats-summary': {
    component: 'ClutchStatsSummary', 
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_clutch_analysis',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    optionalFilters: ['season'],
    displayType: 'stats-cards',
    description: 'Clutch performance summary statistics'
  },
  
  'league-comparison-stats': {
    component: 'LeagueComparisonStats',
    dataEndpoint: '/team/get_league_comparison',
    requiredFilters: ['team'],
    displayType: 'comparison-table',
    description: 'Detailed team vs league statistics'
  }
}
```

### **2. Content Mode Definitions**

Based on your filter hierarchy, here are the content modes and their associated blocks:

#### **League-Centric Content Modes**
```javascript
LEAGUE_CONTENT_MODES = {
  'database-overview': {
    title: 'Database Overview',
    blocks: [
      'database-summary-stats',
      'top-leagues-table', 
      'recent-activity-feed'
    ]
  },
  
  'league-overview': {
    title: 'League Multi-Season Overview',
    blocks: [
      'league-standings-table',      // Latest standings
      'season-comparison-chart',     // Compare seasons
      'league-averages-chart',       // League performance trends
      'top-performers-table'         // Best teams across seasons  
    ]
  },
  
  'season-standings': {
    title: 'Season Detailed View', 
    blocks: [
      'league-standings-table',      // Current standings
      'season-progression-chart',    // Position changes over time
      'team-averages-chart',         // Score trends
      'honor-scores-table'           // High scores this season
    ]
  },
  
  'week-standings': {
    title: 'Week-Specific Analysis',
    blocks: [
      'league-standings-table',      // Standings after this week
      'head-to-head-table',         // This week's matchups
      'week-highlights-table',       // Week's best performances
      'points-distribution-chart'    // Week scoring distribution
    ]
  },
  
  'team-deep-dive': {
    title: 'Team Performance Analysis',
    blocks: [
      'team-history-chart',         // Multi-season history
      'league-comparison-chart',    // vs league average  
      'clutch-performance-chart',   // Clutch games
      'consistency-metrics',        // Consistency stats
      'special-matches-table'       // Highlights
    ]
  }
}
```

#### **Team-Centric Content Modes** 
```javascript
TEAM_CONTENT_MODES = {
  'team-all-seasons': {
    title: 'Team Complete History',
    blocks: [
      'team-history-chart',         // Position history
      'league-comparison-chart',    // Performance vs leagues
      'consistency-metrics',        // Overall consistency  
      'special-matches-table',      // Career highlights
      'season-summary-table'        // Season-by-season breakdown
    ]
  },
  
  'team-season-analysis': {
    title: 'Team Season Deep-Dive', 
    blocks: [
      'season-progression-chart',   // Position changes this season
      'league-comparison-chart',    // vs current league
      'clutch-performance-chart',   // Season clutch games
      'consistency-metrics',        // Season consistency
      'special-matches-table'       // Season highlights
    ]
  },
  
  'team-week-performance': {
    title: 'Team Week Analysis',
    blocks: [
      'week-performance-summary',   // Week stats summary
      'week-vs-season-comparison',  // How this week compares
      'opponent-analysis',          // Analysis of week's opponent
      'player-contributions'        // Individual player performance
    ]
  }
}
```

### **3. Block Composition System**

#### **Content Block Interface**
```javascript
class ContentBlock {
  constructor(config) {
    this.id = config.id;
    this.dataEndpoint = config.dataEndpoint;
    this.requiredFilters = config.requiredFilters;
    this.optionalFilters = config.optionalFilters || [];
    this.containerId = config.containerId;
  }
  
  canRender(filterState) {
    return this.requiredFilters.every(filter => 
      filterState[filter] && filterState[filter] !== ''
    );
  }
  
  async fetchData(filterState) {
    const params = this.buildParams(filterState);
    return await fetch(`${this.dataEndpoint}?${params}`);
  }
  
  render(data, containerId) {
    // Implemented by specific block types
  }
  
  destroy() {
    // Cleanup charts, event listeners, etc.
  }
}
```

#### **Block Layout System**
```javascript
LAYOUT_TEMPLATES = {
  'single-column': {
    containerClass: 'col-12',
    blockWrappers: ['<div class="card mb-4">']
  },
  
  'two-column': {
    containerClass: 'row',
    blockWrappers: [
      '<div class="col-md-8">',  // Main content
      '<div class="col-md-4">'   // Sidebar content  
    ]
  },
  
  'dashboard-grid': {
    containerClass: 'row',
    blockWrappers: [
      '<div class="col-md-12">',  // Full width chart
      '<div class="col-md-8">',   // Main content  
      '<div class="col-md-4">',   // Stats sidebar
      '<div class="col-md-6">',   // Half width blocks
      '<div class="col-md-6">'
    ]
  }
}
```

### **4. Block Dependencies & Relationships**

```javascript
BLOCK_RELATIONSHIPS = {
  'team-history-chart': {
    enhances: ['league-comparison-chart'],  // Better with league context
    conflicts: [],                          // No conflicts
    fallbacks: ['team-summary-stats']       // If chart fails to load
  },
  
  'clutch-performance-chart': {
    enhances: ['clutch-stats-summary'],     // Chart + stats work well together  
    requires: ['consistency-metrics'],      // Needs consistency data for context
    conflicts: ['season-progression-chart'] // Too many charts in one view
  }
}
```

**This content block system provides:**

✅ **Reusability**: Blocks can be used across different views
✅ **Flexibility**: Easy to create new content modes by combining blocks  
✅ **Maintainability**: Each block is self-contained with clear dependencies
✅ **Scalability**: New blocks can be added without affecting existing ones
✅ **Conditional Rendering**: Blocks only render when appropriate filters are available

**Does this content block design capture the functionality you need?** The next step would be designing the state management system to coordinate between filters and content blocks.

_**Agent**_

Excellent point! Let me analyze the existing interfaces and design the refactoring to preserve them. This is crucial for a safe, incremental migration.

## **Interface Preservation Analysis**

### **✅ Backend Interfaces to PRESERVE (No Changes Needed)**

From my analysis, these existing endpoints work perfectly with the new architecture:

#### **Team Routes** (all good as-is):
```javascript
// Current interfaces that work perfectly:
'/team/get_teams'                           // ✅ No params needed
'/team/get_available_seasons?team_name=X'   // ✅ Perfect for filter updates  
'/team/get_available_weeks?team_name=X&season=Y' // ✅ Perfect for filter updates
'/team/get_team_history?team_name=X'        // ✅ Works for team history block
'/team/get_league_comparison?team_name=X'   // ✅ Works for league comparison block  
'/team/get_clutch_analysis?team_name=X&season=Y' // ✅ Optional season parameter
'/team/get_consistency_metrics?team_name=X&season=Y' // ✅ Optional season parameter
'/team/get_special_matches?team_name=X&season=Y' // ✅ Optional season parameter
```

#### **League Routes** (existing endpoints are sufficient):
```javascript
'/league/get_combinations'                  // ✅ For filter population
'/league/get_team_positions?league=X&season=Y&week=Z' // ✅ For standings
'/league/get_team_averages?league=X&season=Y' // ✅ For progression charts
```

#### **Chart Functions** (all preserved):
```javascript
// Existing chart functions work as-is:
createLineChart(data, order, containerId, title, labels, invertYAxis, yAxisRange)
createAreaChart_vanilla(referenceData, actualData, chartId, title, labels)  
createClutchPerformanceChart(opponentData, containerId, title)
createTable(config) // All table creation functions
```

### **🔄 State Management Design (Preserving Interfaces)**

#### **Filter State Manager** 
```javascript
class FilterStateManager {
  constructor(viewSchema) {
    this.schema = viewSchema;
    this.state = this.parseUrlParams();
    this.callbacks = [];
  }
  
  // Existing API call patterns preserved exactly
  updateTeamSelect() {
    // Same fetch pattern as current code
    fetch('/team/get_teams')
      .then(response => response.json()) 
      .then(teams => this.populateTeamSelect(teams));
  }
  
  updateSeasonButtons(teamName) {
    // Exact same API call as current implementation
    fetch(`/team/get_available_seasons?team_name=${teamName}`)
      .then(response => response.json())
      .then(seasons => this.populateSeasonButtons(seasons));
  }
  
  updateWeekButtons(teamName, season) {
    // Exact same API call as current implementation  
    fetch(`/team/get_available_weeks?team_name=${teamName}&season=${season}`)
      .then(response => response.json())
      .then(weeks => this.populateWeekButtons(weeks));
  }
}
```

#### **Content Block Data Fetching** (Preserved Patterns)
```javascript
class TeamHistoryBlock extends ContentBlock {
  async fetchData(filterState) {
    // Exact same API call as current updateTeamHistory function
    const response = await fetch(`/team/get_team_history?team_name=${filterState.team}`);
    return response.json();
  }
  
  render(data, containerId) {
    // Reuse existing chart creation - NO CHANGES to chart functions
    const seasons = Object.keys(data);
    const combinedPositions = seasons.map(season => {
      const leagueLevel = data[season].league_level;
      const position = data[season].final_position;  
      return (leagueLevel - 1) * 10 + position;
    });
    
    // Call existing chart function with same parameters
    const ctx = document.getElementById(containerId).getContext('2d');
    if (window.teamHistoryChart instanceof Chart) {
      window.teamHistoryChart.destroy();
    }
    
    // Same chart creation code as current implementation
    window.teamHistoryChart = new Chart(ctx, { /* same config */ });
  }
}
```

### **🎯 URL-Based State Management (New, Non-Breaking)**

#### **URL Structure** (purely additive):
```javascript
// Current: /team/stats (no URL state)
// New:     /team/stats?team=TeamX&season=2024&week=5

// Backward compatible - if no URL params, works exactly like before
class URLStateManager {
  parseUrlParams() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    return {
      team: params.get('team') || '',      // Empty = same as current "no selection"
      season: params.get('season') || '',  // Empty = "All" button selected  
      week: params.get('week') || '',      // Empty = no week selected
      league: params.get('league') || ''   // For future league-centric views
    };
  }
  
  updateUrl(state) {
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    Object.entries(state).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (value && value !== '') params.set(key, value);
    });
    
    const newUrl = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
    window.history.pushState(state, '', newUrl);
  }
}
```

### **⚡ Migration Strategy (Zero Downtime)**

#### **Phase 1: Extract Existing Functions (No Interface Changes)**
```javascript
// Move existing functions to modules - same signatures
// team-chart-utils.js  
function updateTeamHistory(teamName) { /* existing code */ }
function updateLeagueComparison(teamName) { /* existing code */ }
function updateClutchAnalysis(teamName, season) { /* existing code */ }

// team-filter-utils.js
function updateTeamSelect(teams) { /* existing code */ }  
function updateSeasonButtons(teamName) { /* existing code */ }
function updateWeekButtons(teamName, season) { /* existing code */ }
```

#### **Phase 2: Add State Management Layer (Additive Only)**
```javascript
// New state manager calls existing functions
class ContentManager {
  updateContent(filterState) {
    if (filterState.team) {
      updateTeamHistory(filterState.team);           // Same function call
      updateLeagueComparison(filterState.team);      // Same function call
      
      if (filterState.season) {
        updateClutchAnalysis(filterState.team, filterState.season); // Same function call
      }
    }
  }
}
```

#### **Phase 3: Incremental Block Migration**
```javascript
// Replace functions one by one with content blocks
// Old: updateTeamHistory(teamName)
// New: new TeamHistoryBlock().render(data, containerId)
// But both use the same API endpoints and chart functions
```

### **🚫 NO Changes Required To:**

- ✅ Any backend route signatures
- ✅ Any chart function signatures (`createLineChart`, `createAreaChart_vanilla`, etc.)
- ✅ Any table function signatures (`createTable`, `createTableBootstrap3`, etc.)
- ✅ Database queries or data processing logic
- ✅ Existing CSS classes or styling
- ✅ Component templates (`tables.html`, `charts.html`)

### **✨ What We Gain Without Breaking Changes:**

- ✅ URL-based state (shareable links)
- ✅ Consistent filter behavior  
- ✅ Modular, maintainable code
- ✅ Reusable content blocks
- ✅ Flexible filter hierarchies
- ✅ Browser back/forward support

**This approach ensures a safe, incremental migration with zero breaking changes to existing interfaces.** We're essentially adding a coordination layer on top of existing functionality rather than replacing it.

Ready to document this architecture approach?

Lines added: 278, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,278 @@
- 
+ # Frontend Refactoring Plan: Team Statistics Architecture
+ 
+ ## 🎯 Project Goals
+ 
+ Transform the monolithic &#96;team/stats.html&#96; (799 lines) into a maintainable, modular architecture with:
+ - **Reliable filtering** with hierarchical data scoping
+ - **Clean data handling** with consistent API interfaces  
+ - **Dynamic content** based on active filters
+ - **Consistent UI** with URL-based state management
+ - **Reusable components** for future development
+ 
+ ## 🚫 Constraints &amp; Preservation
+ 
+ ### Must NOT Change:
+ - ✅ Backend route signatures (&#96;/team/get_*&#96;, &#96;/league/get_*&#96;)
+ - ✅ Chart function signatures (&#96;createLineChart&#96;, &#96;createAreaChart_vanilla&#96;, etc.)
+ - ✅ Table function signatures (&#96;createTable&#96;, &#96;createTableBootstrap3&#96;, etc.)
+ - ✅ Existing CSS classes or component templates
+ - ✅ Database schemas or data processing logic
+ 
+ ### Interface Preservation Strategy:
+ - Extract existing functions into modules with same signatures
+ - Add coordination layer on top (no replacement)
+ - Incremental migration (function by function)
+ - Zero breaking changes to existing APIs
+ 
+ ## 🏗️ New Architecture Overview
+ 
+ ### Core Components:
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ ├── FilterManager          # Handles filter state &amp; validation
+ ├── URLStateManager        # Syncs state with URL parameters  
+ ├── ContentRenderer        # Orchestrates content block rendering
+ ├── DataManager           # Manages API calls &amp; caching
+ └── ContentBlocks/        # Reusable display components
+     ├── TeamHistoryBlock
+     ├── ClutchAnalysisBlock
+     ├── LeagueComparisonBlock
+     └── ConsistencyMetricsBlock
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## 📂 Proposed File Structure
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ app/static/js/
+ ├── core/
+ │   ├── filter-manager.js      # Filter state management
+ │   ├── url-state-manager.js   # URL synchronization
+ │   ├── content-renderer.js    # Content orchestration
+ │   └── data-manager.js        # API calls &amp; caching
+ ├── content-blocks/
+ │   ├── base-content-block.js  # Abstract base class
+ │   ├── team-history-block.js  # Team position history
+ │   ├── clutch-analysis-block.js # Clutch performance
+ │   ├── league-comparison-block.js # Team vs league
+ │   ├── consistency-metrics-block.js # Consistency stats
+ │   └── special-matches-block.js # Highlights table
+ ├── legacy/
+ │   ├── team-chart-utils.js    # Extracted chart functions
+ │   ├── team-filter-utils.js   # Extracted filter functions
+ │   └── team-data-utils.js     # Extracted data functions
+ ├── config/
+ │   ├── filter-schemas.js      # View-specific filter hierarchies
+ │   ├── content-modes.js       # Content block combinations
+ │   └── api-endpoints.js       # Centralized endpoint definitions
+ └── team-stats-app.js          # Main application entry point
+ 
+ app/templates/team/
+ ├── stats.html                 # Simplified main template
+ ├── components/
+ │   ├── filter-controls.html   # Reusable filter UI
+ │   ├── content-container.html # Dynamic content area
+ │   └── loading-states.html    # Loading indicators
+ └── blocks/                    # Individual content block templates
+     ├── team-history.html
+     ├── clutch-analysis.html
+     ├── league-comparison.html
+     └── consistency-metrics.html
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## 🔄 Migration Strategy (4 Phases)
+ 
+ ### Phase 1: Extract &amp; Modularize (No Breaking Changes)
+ **Goal**: Break down the monolithic file while preserving exact functionality
+ 
+ **Steps**:
+ 1. Extract existing functions to modules with identical signatures
+ 2. Create legacy utility files 
+ 3. Update main template to import modules
+ 4. Verify functionality unchanged
+ 
+ **Files Created**:
+ - &#96;legacy/team-chart-utils.js&#96; - All chart functions
+ - &#96;legacy/team-filter-utils.js&#96; - All filter functions  
+ - &#96;legacy/team-data-utils.js&#96; - All data fetching functions
+ 
+ **Validation**: Original functionality works identically
+ 
+ ### Phase 2: Add State Management Layer (Additive Only)
+ **Goal**: Add URL-based state management calling existing functions
+ 
+ **Steps**:
+ 1. Create &#96;FilterManager&#96; that calls existing filter functions
+ 2. Add &#96;URLStateManager&#96; for browser state synchronization
+ 3. Create &#96;ContentRenderer&#96; that calls existing chart functions
+ 4. Add URL parameter parsing (backward compatible)
+ 
+ **Files Created**:
+ - &#96;core/filter-manager.js&#96;
+ - &#96;core/url-state-manager.js&#96; 
+ - &#96;core/content-renderer.js&#96;
+ - &#96;team-stats-app.js&#96; (coordinator)
+ 
+ **New Features**: 
+ - URL reflects current state
+ - Shareable links
+ - Browser back/forward support
+ - Consistent filter behavior
+ 
+ ### Phase 3: Implement Content Blocks (Gradual Replacement)
+ **Goal**: Replace individual functions with content block system
+ 
+ **Steps**:
+ 1. Create &#96;BaseContentBlock&#96; abstract class
+ 2. Implement one content block at a time
+ 3. Each block uses existing chart/table functions
+ 4. Gradually replace function calls with block rendering
+ 5. Add dynamic content modes based on filter state
+ 
+ **Migration Order**:
+ 1. &#96;TeamHistoryBlock&#96; (simple chart)
+ 2. &#96;LeagueComparisonBlock&#96; (area chart + table)
+ 3. &#96;ClutchAnalysisBlock&#96; (bar chart + stats)
+ 4. &#96;ConsistencyMetricsBlock&#96; (metrics display)
+ 5. &#96;SpecialMatchesBlock&#96; (tables)
+ 
+ **Files Created**:
+ - &#96;content-blocks/base-content-block.js&#96;
+ - &#96;content-blocks/team-history-block.js&#96;
+ - &#96;content-blocks/league-comparison-block.js&#96;
+ - &#96;content-blocks/clutch-analysis-block.js&#96;
+ - &#96;content-blocks/consistency-metrics-block.js&#96;
+ - &#96;content-blocks/special-matches-block.js&#96;
+ 
+ ### Phase 4: Advanced Features &amp; Optimization
+ **Goal**: Add advanced filtering and performance optimizations
+ 
+ **Steps**:
+ 1. Implement flexible filter hierarchies
+ 2. Add data caching and request deduplication
+ 3. Create reusable filter schemas for other views
+ 4. Add loading states and error handling
+ 5. Performance optimization and testing
+ 
+ **Files Created**:
+ - &#96;config/filter-schemas.js&#96;
+ - &#96;config/content-modes.js&#96;
+ - &#96;core/data-manager.js&#96;
+ - &#96;templates/team/components/&#96; (UI components)
+ 
+ ## 📋 Implementation Details
+ 
+ ### Filter Schema Example (Team-Centric View):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ const TEAM_FILTER_SCHEMA = {
+   hierarchy: ['database', 'team', 'season', 'week'],
+   contentModes: {
+     0: 'database-overview',
+     1: 'team-selection-prompt', 
+     2: 'team-all-seasons',
+     3: 'team-season-analysis',
+     4: 'team-week-performance'
+   },
+   apiEndpoints: {
+     teams: '/team/get_teams',
+     seasons: '/team/get_available_seasons',
+     weeks: '/team/get_available_weeks'
+   }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Content Mode Definitions:
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ const CONTENT_MODES = {
+   'team-all-seasons': {
+     title: 'Team Complete History',
+     layout: 'dashboard-grid',
+     blocks: [
+       { type: 'team-history-block', container: 'chart-main' },
+       { type: 'league-comparison-block', container: 'chart-secondary' }, 
+       { type: 'consistency-metrics-block', container: 'stats-sidebar' },
+       { type: 'special-matches-block', container: 'table-full' }
+     ]
+   },
+   
+   'team-season-analysis': {
+     title: 'Team Season Deep-Dive',
+     layout: 'two-column',
+     blocks: [
+       { type: 'clutch-analysis-block', container: 'main-content' },
+       { type: 'consistency-metrics-block', container: 'sidebar' },
+       { type: 'special-matches-block', container: 'full-width' }
+     ]
+   }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### Content Block Implementation:
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ class TeamHistoryBlock extends BaseContentBlock {
+   constructor() {
+     super({
+       id: 'team-history',
+       dataEndpoint: '/team/get_team_history',
+       requiredFilters: ['team'],
+       template: 'blocks/team-history.html'
+     });
+   }
+   
+   async fetchData(filterState) {
+     // Use existing API endpoint - no changes
+     const response = await fetch(&#96;${this.dataEndpoint}?team_name=${filterState.team}&#96;);
+     return response.json();
+   }
+   
+   render(data, containerId) {
+     // Call existing chart function - no changes to chart interface
+     updateTeamHistory(filterState.team);
+   }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## 🎯 Success Metrics
+ 
+ ### Maintainability:
+ - ✅ Reduce main template from 799 to &lt;100 lines
+ - ✅ Modular code with single responsibilities  
+ - ✅ Reusable components across views
+ - ✅ Clear separation of concerns
+ 
+ ### Functionality:
+ - ✅ All existing features work identically
+ - ✅ URL-based state management
+ - ✅ Consistent filter behavior across views
+ - ✅ Reliable data handling with proper error states
+ - ✅ Dynamic content based on filter selection
+ 
+ ### Developer Experience:
+ - ✅ Easy to add new content blocks
+ - ✅ Clear debugging with modular architecture
+ - ✅ Safe incremental migration
+ - ✅ Zero breaking changes to existing APIs
+ 
+ ## 🚀 Next Steps
+ 
+ 1. **Start Phase 1**: Extract existing functions to modules
+ 2. **Create base file structure**: Set up directories and placeholder files
+ 3. **Implement Phase 1**: Modularize while preserving exact functionality  
+ 4. **Test &amp; Validate**: Ensure no regressions
+ 5. **Continue to Phase 2**: Add state management layer
+ 
+ **Risk Mitigation**: Each phase can be deployed independently, allowing rollback if issues occur.
+ 
+ ## 📚 Technical References
+ 
+ ### Key Design Patterns:
+ - **Command Pattern**: Content blocks encapsulate rendering logic
+ - **Observer Pattern**: State changes trigger content updates
+ - **Strategy Pattern**: Different filter schemas for different views
+ - **Facade Pattern**: Legacy utilities hide complexity during migration
+ 
+ ### Dependencies Preserved:
+ - Chart.js and ECharts (existing chart libraries)
+ - Bootstrap CSS framework  
+ - Existing table utilities
+ - Current API endpoint structure
+ 
+ This plan provides a clear, safe path from the current monolithic architecture to a maintainable, modular system while preserving all existing functionality and interfaces.
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! I've completed the comprehensive **Frontend Refactoring Plan** and documented it in `FRONTEND_REFACTORING_PLAN.md`.

## 📋 **Plan Summary**

### **🎯 What We've Designed:**

1. **✅ Safe Migration Strategy**: 4-phase approach with zero breaking changes
2. **✅ Interface Preservation**: All existing APIs, charts, and tables unchanged  
3. **✅ Modular Architecture**: Clean separation with reusable content blocks
4. **✅ Flexible Filtering**: Schema-based system supporting different view hierarchies
5. **✅ URL State Management**: Shareable links and browser navigation support

### **📂 Key Architecture Components:**

- **FilterManager**: Handles hierarchical filter logic
- **ContentRenderer**: Orchestrates dynamic content based on filters
- **URLStateManager**: Syncs application state with URL parameters
- **ContentBlocks**: Reusable components (TeamHistory, ClutchAnalysis, etc.)
- **Legacy Utilities**: Preserve existing functions during transition

### **🔄 Migration Phases:**

1. **Phase 1**: Extract existing code to modules (no functionality changes)
2. **Phase 2**: Add state management layer (additive features)  
3. **Phase 3**: Implement content block system (gradual replacement)
4. **Phase 4**: Advanced features and optimization

### **🚫 Preserved Interfaces:**

- All backend routes: `/team/get_*`, `/league/get_*`
- All chart functions: `createLineChart`, `createAreaChart_vanilla`
- All table functions: `createTable`, `createTableBootstrap3`  
- All CSS classes and templates
- Database schemas and data processing

### **✨ Benefits Achieved:**

- **Maintainability**: 799-line monolith → modular components
- **Reliability**: Consistent filter behavior and error handling
- **Reusability**: Content blocks work across different views
- **User Experience**: URL-based state, shareable links, browser navigation
- **Developer Experience**: Clear debugging, safe migration, easy extensibility

The plan provides a **concrete roadmap** for transforming the frontend while maintaining all existing functionality. Each phase can be implemented and tested independently, ensuring a safe migration path.

**Ready to start implementation?** We can begin with Phase 1 - extracting the existing functions into modules while preserving exact functionality.

---
